transcript: Speaker A: बिर्याणी पप्पा म्हणालेत ज्या दिवशी तू English मध्ये बोलशील त्या दिवशी लग्नाची चर्चा करू. [Biryani, Papa said the day you speak in English, we will discuss marriage.] Speaker B: बस इतकंच? [Just that?] Speaker A: तुला तर "Thank you" बोलतानाही घाम येतो. [You even sweat while saying "Thank you".] Speaker B: यायचा, आता नाही. उद्या भेटव तुझ्या पप्पांना. [I used to, not anymore. Introduce me to your Papa tomorrow.] Speaker C: तर तू आहेस बिर्याणी, ज्याला माझ्या मुली रायताशी लग्न करायचं आहे? काय आहे तुझी औकात? [So you are Biryani, who wants to marry my daughter Raita? What is your status?] Speaker B: Uncle, with all due respect, I understand your concern, but I will never disappoint you, and I will always keep Raita happy. Speaker C: बिर्याणी, तू आणि English? मागच्या वेळी तर "हो अंकल" पेक्षा जास्त काही बोलूच शकला नाहीस. [Biryani, you and English? Last time you couldn't say anything more than "Yes Uncle".] Speaker B: हो अंकल... मागच्या वेळी तुम्ही विचारलं होतं "What are your intentions?" आणि मी काहीच बोलू शकलो नाही. तेव्हा रायता रडत मला म्हणाली, "पप्पांना वाटतं तुला English येतच नाही." त्याच रात्री मी MySivi App install केलं आणि ₹1 चा trial घेतला. मग रोज 15 मिनिट AI teacher सोबत English बोलायची practice करायला लागलो. AI माझ्या grammar च्या चुका लगेच सुधारायची, pronunciation improve करायची आणि real conversations ची practice द्यायची. हळूहळू माझा confidence वाढायला लागला. [Yes Uncle... Last time you asked "What are your intentions?" and I couldn't say anything. Then Raita crying told me, "Papa thinks you don't know English at all." That same night I installed MySivi App and took the ₹1 trial. Then daily for 15 minutes I started practicing speaking English with the AI teacher. AI would immediately correct my grammar mistakes, improve pronunciation, and give practice of real conversations. Slowly my confidence started to grow.] Speaker A: जर बिर्याणी English शिकू शकते, तर तुम्हीही नक्की शिकू शकता. म्हणून आजच MySivi App download करा आणि फक्त ₹1 च्या trial मध्ये तुमची English speaking journey सुरू करा. [If Biryani can learn English, then you too can definitely learn. So download MySivi App today and start your English speaking journey in just a ₹1 trial.]

summary: An AI-animated Marathi ad featuring food characters where Biryani must learn English to marry Raita. After failing to impress her father, Biryani uses the MySivi app's AI teacher to practice daily and improve his speaking skills. The ad promotes downloading the app to start learning English with a 1-rupee trial.
